mapper.sql:
select u.user_id , u.user_name , u.login_name , u.email, u.sign_file_id, f.original_name as sign_file_name, u.phone_number, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag , u.login_ip , u.login_date , u.create_by , u.user_type, u.leader_type, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.remark, u.user_ip_address, d.dept_id , d.parent_id , d.dept_name , d.order_num , d.leader, d.status dept_status, ss.security_name,u.security_id, ss.security_value from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_security ss on ss.security_id = u.security_id left join sys_oss f on f.oss_id = u.sign_file_id
where u.del_flag !='2' and u.user_type = '0'

select u.user_id , u.user_name , u.login_name , u.email, u.sign_file_id, f.original_name as sign_file_name, u.phone_number, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag , u.login_ip , u.login_date , u.create_by , u.user_type, u.leader_type, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.remark, d.dept_id , d.parent_id , d.dept_name , d.order_num , d.leader, d.status dept_status, r.role_id role_id, r.role_name role_name, r.role_key , r.role_sort , r.data_scope , r.role_status,ss.security_name,u.security_id, ss.security_value from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_security ss on ss.security_id = u.security_id left join sys_oss f on f.oss_id = u.sign_file_id
where u.del_flag !='2' and u.user_type = '0'

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.login_name, u.email, u.sign_file_id, f.original_name as sign_file_name, u.phone_number, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, u.leader_type, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.role_status, ss.security_name, u.security_id, ss.security_value from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id left join sys_oss f on f.oss_id = u.sign_file_id left join sys_security ss on ss.security_id = u.security_id
mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.login_name from () u where u.del_flag = '0'

select u.* from () u where u.del_flag = '0'
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
AND date_format(u.create_time,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(u.create_time,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%y%m%d')
AND (u.dept_id = #{deptId} OR u.dept_id IN ( SELECT t.dept_id FROM sys_dept t WHERE find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) ))

select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.login_name, u.email, u.phone_number, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and r.role_id = #{user.roleId}
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{user.userName}, '%')

select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.login_name, u.email, u.phone_number, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and (r.role_id != #{user.roleId} or r.role_id IS NULL) and u.user_id not in (select u.user_id from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id and sur.role_id = #{user.roleId})
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{user.userName}, '%')
select u.* from () u where u.user_id in ( select p.user_id from hdy_project_user p where p.project_id = #{projectId} )
